title: Undefined variable error in Code Tool
symptom: When executing a Python function in the Code Tool, an error occurs stating 'name '_query' is not defined'.
not_this_if: The code does not reference '_query' or uses correct variable names
root_cause: In the Code Tool, input variables are directly accessible without needing to reference them through a '_query' object. Attempting to use '_query' leads to a NameError since it is not defined in that context.
fix_steps: Remove the '_query' reference from the return statement
Use the input variable name directly, e.g., return get_jurisdiction(query_location_ids)
Test the code again to ensure it executes without errors
agent_instruction: Change the return statement to use the input variable directly instead of '_query'.
